---
title: "`r params$title`"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 2
    theme: flatly
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    latex_engine: xelatex
params:
  entries: NULL
  title: "Codebook"
  survey: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r preamble, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(params$survey)) {
  cat("> **Survey wave:** ", params$survey, "\n\n", sep = "")
}
cat("**Total variables:** ", length(params$entries), "\n\n", sep = "")
```

---

```{r variables, results='asis'}
for (entry in params$entries) {

  # --- Heading ---
  cat("## `", entry$variable_id, "` \u2014 ", entry$title,
      " {#", entry$variable_id, "}\n\n", sep = "")

  # --- Type badge ---
  cat("**Type:** `", entry$storage_type, "`", sep = "")
  if (!is.null(entry$vargroup)) {
    cat(" &nbsp;&nbsp; **Variable group:** `", entry$vargroup, "`", sep = "")
  }
  if (!is.null(entry$universe)) {
    cat(" &nbsp;&nbsp; **Universe:** ", entry$universe, sep = "")
  }
  cat("\n\n")

  # --- Question / Description text ---
  if (!is.null(entry$text) && nchar(trimws(entry$text)) > 0) {
    cat(entry$text, "\n\n", sep = "")
  }

  # --- Value labels ---
  if (!is.null(entry$value_labels) && length(entry$value_labels) > 0) {
    vl <- entry$value_labels
    cat("**Value labels**")
    if (!is.null(entry$value_labels_name)) {
      cat(" (`", entry$value_labels_name, "`)", sep = "")
    }
    cat(":\n\n")
    cat("| Value | Label |\n")
    cat("|-------|-------|\n")
    for (i in seq_along(vl$values)) {
      cat("| ", vl$values[i], " | ", vl$labels[i], " |\n", sep = "")
    }
    cat("\n")
  }

  # --- Surveys used ---
  if (!is.null(params$survey)) {
    # Single-survey mode: no need to repeat
  } else if (!is.null(entry$surveys_used) && length(entry$surveys_used) > 0) {
    cat("**Surveys used:** ", paste(entry$surveys_used, collapse = ", "), "\n\n", sep = "")
  }

  # --- Source / citation ---
  if (!is.null(entry$cite) && nchar(trimws(entry$cite)) > 0) {
    cat("**Source:** ", entry$cite, "\n\n", sep = "")
  }

  # --- Notes ---
  if (!is.null(entry$note) && nchar(trimws(entry$note)) > 0) {
    cat("> **Note:** ", entry$note, "\n\n", sep = "")
  }

  cat("---\n\n")
}
```
